markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore an AEO content partnership for Manifold.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Manifold's Need:** Al, new Head of Marketing, needs a 2026 AEO strategy for Manifold, a life sciences AI platform, to build domain authority with a small team.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Dual ICP Challenge:** Content must target two audiences: bottoms-up scientists (product users) and tops-down business decision-makers (buyers).](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A hybrid model using AI workflows for scale and human SMEs for accuracy, with a two-phase engagement: an 8-week strategy sprint followed by 12 months of execution.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Tyler will analyze the search landscape around competitor Benchling; Al will provide content examples. A follow-up is scheduled for after Thanksgiving.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)

## Topics

### Manifold's Challenge: AEO Strategy for a Niche Platform

  - [**Context:** Al, new Head of Marketing, is building the 2026 AEO strategy for Manifold, a life sciences AI platform.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Platform:** Manifold's AI platform helps scientists synthesize complex R\&D data, bridging the gap between data sprawl and the need for new treatments.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** Content must serve two personas:](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [**Bottoms-up:** Scientists (product users)](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [**Tops-down:** Business decision-makers (buyers)](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Constraints:** A small marketing team (1.5 people) requires a scalable solution to build domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: Hybrid AI + Human Content Engine

  - [**Approach:** A hybrid model combining AI workflows for scale with human SMEs for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [**Team:** Includes a Chief Content Officer (ex-TechCrunch EIC) and editors with backgrounds at Ramp, Brex, and Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks)**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
          - [Focus: Context engineering and persona development.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
          - [Deliverable: Publish initial content to build momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution (12 months)**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
          - [Deliverable: Scale content production.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
          - [Note: Production volume depends on the client's review and approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
    1.  [**Brief Generation:** AI analyzes keywords, SERPs, and competitors to create a detailed brief.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
    2.  [**Drafting:** AI generates a draft using the brief, company context, and persona artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
    3.  [**Review & Validation:** Human editors check accuracy and suggest rewrites for unvalidated passages.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
    4.  [**Finalization:** Adds cross-linking, citations, SEO meta tags, and images.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
    5.  [**Publishing:** GrowthX handles staging and publishing on Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
      - [**AEO:** Tracks LLM visibility and positioning against competitors via Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
      - [**SEO:** Monitors engagement, clicks, and conversions via a custom Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

### AEO & Website Strategy

  - [**GrowthX's Recommendation:**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Scale Content:** Publish consistently to build domain authority, a prerequisite for AEO success.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [**Segment Content:** Use separate sections (e.g., `/guides` for bottom-funnel, `/blog` for top-funnel) to guide user journeys.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [**Drive Traffic:** Top-funnel content in LLMs should cite the website to drive direct traffic and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [Analyze the search landscape around competitor **Benchling**.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
      - [Research Manifold's history with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
      - [Send a calendar link to schedule the follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [**Al:**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [Provide examples of content caliber Manifold wants to create.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
      - [Meet after Thanksgiving to review findings and discuss a potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/qmx8sG_uFKw-6oh71ZsWT_okM2BY_WxX?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
